items: Hunter Goodman homered 3 times, driving in 5 as Colorado beat Minnesota, 8-5.
Foster Griffin blanked Baltimore for 7.0 innings, striking out 9 in Washington's 4-3 win.
Rafael Devers homered 2 times, driving in 4 as San Francisco beat Atlanta, 5-0.
Hunter Goodman had 5 RBI, with 3 home runs as Colorado beat Minnesota, 8-5.
San Francisco pitching combined to shut out Atlanta, 5-0.
Cleveland walked off Seattle, 4-3 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
